sectionSubtitle: Capabilities across security architecture, DevSecOps, compliance, and infrastructure sovereignty. Every engagement delivers blueprints your team can build — not just recommendations they'll forget.

cards.title: First Light
cards.subtitle: Understand where you stand and what to fix first.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You don't know what you don't know. Your security is whatever your team has had time for — which isn't much. Start here.
cards.body: A comprehensive review of your architecture, infrastructure, and compliance posture — delivering a prioritized roadmap that tells you exactly what to address, in what order, and why.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A penetration test. If our assessment reveals that a pen test would be valuable, we'll tell you — and recommend firms who specialize in that.

valueComparison.note: Individual vendors operate in silos. We compile everything into one engineering roadmap.

cards.ctaMappingText: Reveal your posture and prioritize remediation.

cards.title: Foundation
cards.subtitle: Build security into your foundation from the start.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You're building something new — a product, a platform, a company. Security decisions made now compound. Get them right.
cards.body: A complete security architecture designed for your specific stack, team, and risk profile. Includes threat modeling, architecture design, IaC starter templates, implementation guide, and a review cycle to validate your team's work.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A penetration test. A compliance audit. A vendor pitch disguised as consulting. Architecture only. For architecture + DevSecOps pipeline, see Pulse.

valueComparison.note: We don't just hand off recommendations — we deliver code templates your team can deploy.

cards.title: Pulse
cards.subtitle: Ship fast. Ship secure. Ship with confidence.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: Your CI/CD pipeline moves fast — but security gates are missing, manual, or bolted on after the fact. Time to fix that.
cards.body: A security-first CI/CD pipeline design — SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, secret detection, container security, and deployment gates. Starter templates included so your team isn't starting from zero.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A managed DevOps service. We design the pipeline — your team implements it with our guidance.

valueComparison.note: Configure automated security checks without slowing down your deployment cycles.

cards.ctaMappingText: Secure your CI/CD gates and secrets.

cards.title: Clearance
cards.subtitle: Compliance that opens doors, not just checks boxes.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: Your next enterprise customer wants SOC 2. Your investors asked about security posture. You need to get audit-ready — without derailing your engineering team for six months.
cards.body: We assess your posture against your target framework, map the gaps, and build a remediation plan that gets you audit-ready. We guide — your team implements. When the auditor comes, you're prepared.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A compliance automation platform. We don't push a button and make you compliant. We build the roadmap — your team walks it.

valueComparison.note: We prepare your actual technical infrastructure for audits, rather than just generating paperwork.

cards.ctaTrackText: Faced with an upcoming compliance audit?

cards.title: Escape Velocity
cards.subtitle: Own your infrastructure. Control your costs. Keep your data where you decide.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: Your cloud bill keeps climbing. Your data lives in someone else's data center. You're paying for compute you don't fully control. Time to explore alternatives.
cards.body: From cloud dependency to digital ownership — migration planning, infrastructure hardening, cost optimization, and security architecture baked in. Multiple paths depending on your goals: full migration, hybrid, or selective optimization.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A simple cloud migration. We don't just lift-and-shift. We design secure boundaries so you hold your own keys and control costs.

valueComparison.note: We ensure digital sovereignty is baked into your migration blueprint so you own your hosting nodes.

cards.ctaTrackText: Struggling with runaway cloud hosting fees?

cards.title: Beacon
cards.subtitle: Security leadership without the full-time hire.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You need a security architect on the team — but not full-time, and not at $150K+/year. You need someone who knows your stack, reviews your decisions, and picks up the phone when something happens.
cards.body: Monthly reviews, strategic guidance, architecture decisions, incident advisory, and compliance updates. Your long-term security partner — always available, never required.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A managed SOC. A 24/7 incident response team. We provide advisory and guidance — not operational monitoring or incident remediation.

valueComparison.note: Get executive-level advisory and architecture validation on a flexible, fractional basis.

cards.ctaMappingText: Bring on a senior architect when needed.

cards.title: Program Foundation
cards.subtitle: The operational backbone your security program needs before anything else.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You have security tools and some controls, but no formal security program. No policies. No incident response plan. No risk management methodology. You need the operational foundation before you can build on top of it.
cards.body: The foundational elements every organization needs regardless of their specific focus — security policies, risk methodology, incident response, and security awareness. This is what we often discover is missing during an Assessment.
deliverables: Security policy framework (infosec policy, acceptable use, access control)
Access control framework (IAM, least privilege, MFA)
cards.whatThisIsNot: A technical architecture blueprint. A compliance audit. This is the operational and governance layer that makes architecture and compliance work.

valueComparison.note: We deliver the operational and governance framework required to satisfy enterprise security standards.

cards.ctaTrackText: Lacking basic security policies or incident plans?

cards.title: Sprint
cards.subtitle: Focused 2-week engagement on one specific area.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You have one specific problem that needs attention now. Not a full assessment. Not a comprehensive blueprint. A focused, time-boxed engagement on one critical area.
cards.body: A Security Sprint is a highly scoped, time-boxed engagement on one critical area. Three formats depending on your needs: Assessment Sprint ($8K), Build Partnership Sprint ($12K), or Extended Sprint ($15K). rules of engagement: Pre-sprint gate checks, 4-point check-in system, strict timebox guarantee. We don't start until you're ready.
deliverables: Focused assessment of the target area
cards.whatThisIsNot: A comprehensive engagement. Sprints are focused and time-boxed. If we discover broader issues during the sprint, we'll flag them — but addressing them requires a separate engagement.

valueComparison.note: Avoid long, draggy consulting timelines. Target a single security friction point inside 2 weeks.

cards.ctaTrackText: Need to solve a single, immediate security issue?
cards.ctaMappingText: Triage one critical sector in a fast-paced sprint.

cards.title: Build Partnership
cards.subtitle: Your team builds it. We make sure they build it right.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: Your team has the blueprint but wants senior guidance during implementation — not just a review after the fact. You want an embedded security architect for the build phase.
cards.body: Weekly sync calls, async access for questions, and hands-on guidance throughout your build phase. We review every critical decision, validate every implementation milestone, and train your team as they build.
deliverables: Weekly sync calls throughout build phase
2-3 pair sessions for complex implementation work
cards.whatThisIsNot: We don't write your Terraform. We don't take 24/7 on-call responsibility. We don't manage your pipeline.

valueComparison.note: We act as an extension of your engineering team to ensure your implementation matches specs.

cards.ctaMappingText: Add guided implementation support to blueprints.

cards.title: Observability
cards.subtitle: Proactive monitoring. Critical alerts. Engineer review.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You have infrastructure running but no visibility into what's happening. You need to know when something's wrong — before your customers do.
cards.body: Proactive monitoring + scheduled reports. Automated critical alerts + bi-weekly reports + engineer review. Not a 24/7 SOC — but critical findings reach you fast.
deliverables: Automated critical alerts with engineer review within 24-48 hours
cards.whatThisIsNot: A 24/7 SOC. Real-time incident response. We monitor and alert — your team responds.

valueComparison.note: Bundle enterprise SIEM infrastructure setup and engineer review for proactive alerting.

cards.ctaMappingText: Deploy active monitoring and review logs.

cards.title: Surge
cards.subtitle: Production-ready infrastructure. Deployed in days. Owned by you from day one.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You want production-ready infrastructure — auth, VPN, observability, the works — but you don't want to spend months building it from scratch. You want it deployed fast, hardened, and handed over.
cards.body: We deploy our pre-built, battle-tested infrastructure stacks on your hardware. You provision the compute. We deploy everything. We hand over the keys. You own it from that point forward. Stacks include: Sovereign Base ($8K), Observability Engine ($12K), and Aurorys Core ($30K+).
deliverables: Full infrastructure deployment on your instances
cards.whatThisIsNot: Managed services. We deploy once and hand off. We are NOT responsible for updates or maintenance after keys transfer.

rows.item: DevOps payroll to build secure baseline (3-6 mo)

valueComparison.note: Skip months of greenfield infrastructure assembly. Deploy hardened components instantly.

cards.title: Full Constellation
cards.subtitle: The complete security overhaul. Every capability. One engagement.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You're serious about security. Not one area — the whole picture. You want to go from "we have some security" to "we have a security program, architecture, pipeline, compliance posture, and ongoing leadership" in one comprehensive engagement.
cards.body: Every capability we offer, integrated into one comprehensive engagement. Assessment, architecture, DevSecOps, compliance, sovereignty, and advisory — delivered as a cohesive program, not a collection of disconnected projects.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A series of disconnected consulting audits. This is a unified security transformation program managed by a single engineering team.

valueComparison.note: A single engineering workforce delivering end-to-end security posture, saving 35-40% in friction.

cards.ctaTrackText: Ready for a complete security transformation?

cards.title: Something else on your mind?
cards.subtitle: Every engagement is scoped individually. Let's talk.
cards.whenYouNeedThis: You need something specific that doesn't fit the packages above — or a custom comprehensive engagement. Let's figure out the right approach together.
cards.body: If you need specific custom architectures, custom integrations, or long-term strategic support that doesn't fit standard paths, we scope every engagement to your team's needs.
cards.whatThisIsNot: A rigid template. We scope our custom work based on first principles.

valueComparison.note: We ensure zero runaway consulting hours by locking deliverables to custom flat rates.

cards.ctaMappingText: Schedule a scoping call for custom engagements.
